race.comment: MISS HVAR (12) raced without luck at her last two starts and assess on the good win at Goulburn three back. Covered a stack of ground in the run with the 60kg for a respectable third over 1300m at Goulburn. Key jockey change and can bounce back today. BUTTERFLY STYLE (9) dropped in trip when she stalked the speed for a sharp win over 1300m at Goulburn with 60.5 kg. No reason she can't repeat the effort today. FIFTYFIVECHEVY (4) progressive gelding resuming. Raced in much tougher company on the provincial and city tracks last time in. Fitted with a sharp 1250m trial win at Hawkesbury. Looks set for a good prep. MISS JENNIFER (1) better run last start when she closed off from back in the field with a narrow fourth over 1200m at this track. Claim helps again and can finally tick the 1400m box.
